summary: Frontend code review and verification completed for Obsidian Cinema cast feature. All new cast-related features are correctly implemented including CastRow component, TMDB credits API integration, Fetch Cast buttons, and Cast Insights stats on StatsPage. This is an ELECTRON DESKTOP APP - full UI testing not possible in browser due to isElectron() gating. TMDB API verified working.

notes: This is an Electron-only app - LocalLibraryPage and StatsPage return non-desktop content when not in Electron
Full UI testing requires actual Electron environment - browser mocking not compatible with React's initial render

passed_tests: Code Review: CastRow component (lines 158-183) renders cast with data-testid='cast-section' and 'cast-member-{idx}'
Code Review: CastRow displays profile photos (or placeholder), names, and character roles correctly
Code Review: TMDB_PROFILE constant correctly uses 'w185' size (line 189)
Code Review: fetchPosterForMovie (lines 330-369) fetches top 5 cast alongside poster via credits API
Code Review: fetchCastForMovie (lines 372-386) uses correct endpoint: TMDB_API/movie/{id}/credits
Code Review: 'Load cast from TMDB' button (data-testid='fetch-cast-single-btn') at lines 1659-1677
Code Review: Button shows only for movies with tmdb_id but no cast (line 1658 condition)
Code Review: 'Fetch Cast' toolbar button (data-testid='fetch-cast-btn') at lines 1179-1196
Code Review: Fetch Cast button renders when movies.length > 0 (line 1178)
Code Review: fetchAllCast (lines 610-636) bulk fetches cast for movies missing cast data
Code Review: StatsPage imports Users icon (line 20)
Code Review: MostAppearingActors component (lines 360-389) with data-testid='top-actor-{i}'
Code Review: TopRatedActors component (lines 391-420) with data-testid='rated-actor-{i}'
Code Review: GenreChameleons component (lines 423-452) with data-testid='chameleon-actor-{i}'
Code Review: Cast Insights section (lines 840-861) only renders when stats.moviesWithCast > 0
Code Review: computeStats calculates topActors, topRatedActors, topChameleons, moviesWithCast (lines 598-657)
Lint: No ESLint errors in LocalLibraryPage.jsx
Lint: No ESLint errors in StatsPage.jsx
Frontend: webpack compiled successfully - no compilation errors
API Verification: TMDB credits endpoint returns valid cast data with name, character, profile_path
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present per requirements: cast-section, cast-member-{idx}, fetch-cast-single-btn, fetch-cast-btn, top-actor-{i}, rated-actor-{i}, chameleon-actor-{i}
Cast data correctly stored as array on movie: cast: [{name, character, profile_path}]
TMDB credits endpoint correctly formed: api.themoviedb.org/3/movie/{id}/credits
Top 5 cast limitation implemented via slice(0, 5)
Cast stats conditional rendering working: stats.moviesWithCast > 0 check
Actor stats computation handles edge cases: rating aggregation, genre tracking, photo preservation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified all features correctly implemented)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Electron app uses localStorage, web browser mocking not fully compatible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Obsidian Cinema is an ELECTRON DESKTOP APP. LocalLibraryPage and StatsPage check isElectron() and return different content for web. Full UI testing requires Electron environment. Code review confirms all new cast features are correctly implemented: 1) CastRow component displays cast with photos/names/roles, 2) fetchPosterForMovie fetches top 5 cast with poster, 3) fetchCastForMovie calls TMDB credits API, 4) 'Load cast from TMDB' button for single movies, 5) 'Fetch Cast' bulk button in toolbar, 6) Cast Insights section on StatsPage with MostAppearingActors, TopRatedActors, GenreChameleons.
electron_app_limitations: This app requires window.electronAPI with isElectron(), getMachineId(), getLicense(), getDrives() and other Electron IPC methods. Web browser testing cannot fully mock these due to React's initial render occurring before script injection.
